# Guillaume Gustin

> Guillaume Gustin crafts responsible software for mission-driven organisations:
> eHealth platforms, public-sector services, GIS tools, and practical AI engineering.
> He is a Brussels-based Solutions Architect, IT Business Analyst, Software Engineer,
> and biomedical engineer trained at UCLouvain.

Guillaume Gustin is a solutions architect, IT business analyst and software engineer
based in Brussels, Belgium. He began in biomedical engineering at UCLouvain, where
software became a way to make health systems more useful to people. Over 10+ years,
he has built patient-monitoring tools, co-founded the medtech startup MedC2, supported
non-profits through digital transformation, and contributed to public-sector platforms.
His current focus is responsible AI engineering, GIS, sustainable web design, and
software that creates measurable social value.

He runs Pwablo (https://pwablo.be), a sustainable web studio.

## Current role

- Software Engineer at Gate 16 (2026–present) — GIS web solutions for Brussels Mobility;
  R&D on RAG systems and agentic AI.

## Background

- Research Software Engineer, Vrije Universiteit Brussel (2025) — analytics dashboard for
  the Ghostly rehabilitation study.
- Founder & Web Designer, Pwablo (2022–present) — sustainable web agency.
- Digital Transformation Advisor, BRUXEO (2022–2024) — supporting non-profits.
- Co-founder & Lead Developer, MedC2 / The Medical Cloud Company (2019–2021) — ePRO
  platforms and patient decision aids for cancer care; later acquired by Comunicare.
- Research & Teaching Assistant, UCLouvain Telecommunication Lab (2017–2019) — diabetes
  remote monitoring system (FEDER-funded).

## Notable contributions

- First author, "Empowerment of diabetic patients through mHealth technologies and
  education" (SIPAIM 2017) — cited 9 times.
- Contributed to the DRAGON EU grant application that secured €860,000 from the European
  Commission for MedC2 (COVID-19 AI tools, 2020).

## Expertise

Solutions architecture, IT business analysis, full-stack web development (React, Astro,
Ionic, Tailwind CSS, shadcn/ui, Node.js, Python, n8n, PostgreSQL, Supabase), AI
engineering (RAG systems, agentic AI, LLM integration, AI governance), responsible IT
(eco-design, digital sobriety, GDPR), digital health and patient-reported outcomes,
GIS platforms, public-sector services, non-profit digital transformation, and
biomedical engineering.

## Published Research

- "GHOSTLY+ Serious Game-Based Exercise for Upper Limb Rehabilitation After Stroke:
  Feasibility Study" — JMIR Serious Games (2025). https://doi.org/10.2196/69400
- "Empowerment of diabetic patients through mHealth technologies and education"
  — SIPAIM 2017. Cited 9 times.

## Education

- Master in Biomedical Engineering (Bioinformatics), UCLouvain — Cum Laude (2016).
- Bachelor in Biomedical & Computer Sciences, UCLouvain (2014).
- MIT Global Startup Labs — Entrepreneurship & Innovation (2018).
